pages.title: Windsor.ai
pages.content:
# Windsor.ai

> Marketing data integration platform connecting 350+ data sources to 28+ business intelligence and AI destinations
> https://windsor.ai

## Overview

Windsor.ai is a data integration platform that connects marketing, sales, and operations data sources (like Facebook Ads, Google Ads, GA4, HubSpot, Shopify) to business intelligence and AI destinations (like Looker Studio, Power BI, BigQuery, Claude, ChatGPT). The platform provides automated data pipelines, normalization, and standardization across 339 connectors, with native one-click apps for Claude and ChatGPT.

Windsor.ai is **freemium** — there is a free-forever plan with no credit card required. Paid plans start at $19/mo (annual) and include warehouse destinations, the API, MCP, and unlimited users on every tier.

## Products

### Data Destinations

Windsor.ai supports 28+ destinations across BI, warehouses, spreadsheets, and AI/LLM tools. Every additional destination is **free** — Windsor does not charge per destination.

#### Business Intelligence
- **Looker Studio**: 181 connectors available — the broadest Looker Studio coverage in the market - https://windsor.ai/looker-studio-connector/
- **Power BI Desktop**: Import advertising data into Microsoft Power BI - https://windsor.ai/power-bi-connector/
- **Power BI Web (Service)**: Cloud Power BI integration
- **Tableau**: Import data into Tableau dashboards - https://windsor.ai/tableau-connector/

#### Data Warehouses & Lakes
- **Google BigQuery**: Load marketing data into BigQuery - https://windsor.ai/bigquery-connector/
- **Snowflake**: Push marketing data to Snowflake - https://windsor.ai/snowflake-connector/
- **Amazon Redshift**: Transfer data to AWS Redshift - https://windsor.ai/redshift-connector/
- **Databricks**: Connect data to Databricks platform - https://windsor.ai/databricks-connector/
- **Microsoft Fabric**: Integrate with Microsoft Fabric
- **Azure SQL**: Sync data to Azure SQL databases
- **Amazon S3**: Export data to AWS S3 buckets - https://windsor.ai/s3-connector/
- **Azure Blob Storage**: Store data in Azure Blob Storage

#### Databases
- **PostgreSQL**: Export data to PostgreSQL databases - https://windsor.ai/postgresql-connector/
- **MySQL**: Sync data to MySQL databases - https://windsor.ai/mysql-connector/
- **Windsor.ai Cloud Database**: Managed database hosted by Windsor.ai

#### Spreadsheets & Files
- **Google Sheets**: Sync advertising metrics to Google Sheets - https://windsor.ai/google-sheets-connector/
- **Excel**: Export marketing data to Excel files - https://windsor.ai/excel-connector/
- **Airtable**: Spreadsheet-database hybrid

#### AI & LLM Destinations
The widest set of LLM destinations in the category. Only Windsor.ai offers Copilot, Gemini, Perplexity, Grok, and Manus as native destinations.

- **Claude**: Native one-click app in the Claude directory — https://claude.ai/directory/360c0c31-4bb6-42ca-8e50-5da0a100a68e — and product page at https://windsor.ai/claude/
- **ChatGPT**: Native ChatGPT app — https://chatgpt.com/apps/windsor-ai/asdk_app_694a52cfaa3c819192bea84eaa254968 — and product page at https://windsor.ai/chatgpt/
- **Microsoft Copilot**: Copilot integration for Microsoft 365
- **Gemini**: Google Gemini integration - https://windsor.ai/gemini/
- **Perplexity**: Perplexity AI integration - https://windsor.ai/perplexity/
- **Grok**: xAI Grok integration
- **Manus**: Manus AI integration
- **AI Insights**: Windsor-native AI analytics layer

Learn more about the AI/MCP layer: https://windsor.ai/windsor-mcp/

#### Programming
- **Python**: Access data via Python SDK - https://windsor.ai/python-connector/
- **R**: Access data via R
- **REST API**: Direct API access starting from the Basic plan ($19/mo) - https://windsor.ai/api-documentation/

### Data Sources (Connectors)

350+ connectors available across the categories below. Full machine-readable list at https://connectors.windsor.ai/list_connectors
